description_long: This shotgun features a robust, tactical design with a matte black and olive green color scheme. The body is composed of a large, angular receiver with a prominent barrel shroud and a compact, integrated stock. The grip is ergonomic and pistol-style, with a visible trigger guard and a small green indicator light on the side. The barrel is single and relatively short, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall build suggests a modern, urban combat application. The surface appears hard and slightly matte, with some sleek elements on the receiver and grip. The shotgun's construction is primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance.
description: A modern, tactical shotgun with a black and olive green finish, featuring a compact stock, pistol grip, and a single short barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular muzzle and the barrel shroud, with the compact width of the shotgun visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the angular receiver, pistol grip, trigger guard, and green indicator light, highlighting the shotgun's tactical design.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the full length of the barrel and receiver, with the grip and stock partially visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the receiver, grip, and stock, but without the indicator light.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
